text: Fill in the blanks about the ventricular system and special sensory pathways.
questions: The lateral ventricles communicate with the 3rd ventricle through the *foramen of Monro/interventricular foramen*, and the 3rd ventricle connects to the 4th via the *cerebral aqueduct/aqueduct of Sylvius*.
In obstructive hydrocephalus caused by *aqueductal stenosis*, the lateral and 3rd ventricles are dilated but the *4th/fourth* ventricle remains normal.
At the optic chiasm, *nasal/nasal retinal* fibres cross to the opposite side while *temporal/temporal retinal* fibres remain ipsilateral.
A pituitary tumour compressing the optic chiasm causes *bitemporal hemianopia/bitemporal* due to damage to the crossing nasal fibres from both eyes.

overallFeedback.feedback: Review the material and try again.
Good effort! Review the areas you missed.
